training_status: ex natural bodybuilder, currently training seriously

benefits.description: Sleep quality greatly improved compared to when not on the blend
Muscle fullness and pumps are great; muscle retention during cut
Powerful fat loss; already needing to put brakes on fat loss at 7 weeks

side_effects.description: Water retention when increased to 2mg tesa; dropped water weight within a couple days after cycle ended
Joint pain crept in around week 3 but subsided near week 5-6

protocol_notes: 37m ex natural bodybuilder. Ran ipa morning fasted, and tesa/ipa evening fasted before bed. Reta dosing progression: 1, 2, 2.5, 3, 3, 4, 4, 5 mg every 5 days. Cycled tesa/ipa up and down due to vacation: 1mg/300mcg at night for 2 weeks, then added same dose morning for ~4 weeks, removed morning dose for 1 week at 1.5mg/450mcg, then 1mg/300mcg nightly until vacation. Also on HCG (water retention source unclear). Multiple pins were complaint due to complexity. Delayed gastric emptying from Reta made evening fasting challenging. Note: water retention may be partly from HCG.
